title: Sync Activity
desc: View current connection, transfer progress, and recent files.

home.autoEnabled: Enabled. New media will sync automatically.
home.waitingForNewAssets: Waiting for new assets to auto sync

phases.reconcilingSubtitle: First-time setup: verifying previously uploaded files
phases.preparingSubtitle: Establishing a secure connection to your computer
phases.reconnectingSubtitle: Upload will resume once the connection is back
phases.autoPreparingSubtitle: Preparing to scan for new photos

running.autoRunningSubtitle: New photos will transfer to your PC automatically.

standby.title: Waiting for New Photos
standby.subtitle: New photos will transfer to your PC after you take them.

notStarted.title: Auto Upload Is Off
notStarted.subtitle: Turn on auto upload to sync new photos and videos after you shoot.

interrupted.title: Auto Upload Paused
interrupted.subtitle: This auto upload was interrupted. Check the receive folder on your computer, then turn it back on.

offline.title: Device Is Offline
offline.subtitle: Make sure your computer is on and on the same network. Once it's back, uploads and shared folder access will resume.

quickEntry.title: Quick Actions
quickEntry.sharedFilesDesc: Browse shared folder and personal shared folder

album.title: Album Library
album.body: Browse photos and videos from here. New media is picked up by the automatic sync queue.

panel.title: Hands-free Backup
panel.body: This panel shows live foreground LAN auto-upload progress while the app stays open.

history.title: Transfer History
history.body: Review completed transfers, including transfer time, file size, and destination path.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.body: Check the connected device, edit the phone display name, or get technical support.

help.title: Help Center
help.body: Need help? Tap here anytime to open the quick start guide or contact support.

syncError.title: Sync Error
syncError.lowDiskPaused: Receiving disk space is below 500 MB. New receive tasks have been paused.
syncError.storageUnavailable: The receive folder on your computer is unavailable. Restore it or choose another folder on the desktop app.

closeAuto.title: Turn Off Auto Upload
closeAuto.body: Turning it off stops the current auto upload, and new photos will not upload automatically.

closeAutoFailed.title: Action Failed
closeAutoFailed.body: Could not turn off auto upload. Please try again later.

reconnectFailed.title: Reconnect Failed
reconnectFailed.body: Reconnect only retries LAN or VPN-LAN paths. If the computer is asleep, check that macOS has Wake for network access enabled, or that Windows has BIOS/UEFI and network adapter Magic Packet wake enabled.

switchDevice.title: Switch Device
switchDevice.body: This will disconnect the current device and return to the device discovery page.

enableAutoBlocked.title: Cannot Enable
enableAutoBlocked.body: Please connect to a device first.

switchUploadMode.title: Switch Upload Mode
switchUploadMode.body: An upload is in progress. Enabling auto upload will restart the sync queue. Continue?

enableAutoFailed.title: Action Failed
enableAutoFailed.body: Could not enable auto upload. Please try again later.

performance.thermalThrottled: Device is running hot — transfer throttled.

autoUploadSettings.title: Auto Upload
autoUploadSettings.subtitle: Set up phone content sync to computer
autoUploadSettings.enableSwitchDescOn: Enabled. Album content will sync automatically.
autoUploadSettings.enableSwitchDescOff: Disabled. Will not automatically sync new library content.
autoUploadSettings.albumDesc: Sync media content from system album
autoUploadSettings.fileDescEmpty: OSS sync uses album media from the pending queue
autoUploadSettings.filePickCancelled: Additional sources are disabled in OSS
autoUploadSettings.filePickFailedBody: OSS sync uses album media from the pending queue.
autoUploadSettings.rangeNowDesc: Only sync new content from now on
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbum: Album photos and videos will sync to your computer.
autoUploadSettings.infoAutoOff: Once auto upload is disabled, subsequent new assets will not sync.
autoUploadSettings.infoEmpty: Please select at least one sync source.
autoUploadSettings.loadConfigFailed: Failed to read auto upload settings. Please try again later.
autoUploadSettings.sourceFileDescEmpty: Only album media is synced in OSS
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumAndFileAll: Album photos and videos will upload to your computer.
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumAndFileNow: From now on, new album photos and videos will sync.
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumAndFileCustom: Album photos and videos within the selected range will upload to your computer.
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumAll: All photos and videos in your album will upload to your computer.
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumNow: From now on, new album photos and videos will sync.
autoUploadSettings.infoAlbumCustom: Album photos and videos within the selected range will upload to your computer.
autoUploadSettings.infoFileAll: OSS sync uses album media from the pending queue.
autoUploadSettings.infoFileNow: OSS sync uses album media from the pending queue.
autoUploadSettings.infoFileCustom: OSS sync uses album media from the pending queue.

recentDownload.title: Recent Downloads
recentDownload.emptyMessage: Files downloaded from your computer to this device will appear here.

syncRecords.title: Sync Records
syncRecords.emptyMessage: After your first auto sync, records will appear here sorted by completion date.
